content:
Applying preview-comment refinements to the LightGBM illustration and syncing the React export copy.
Applying preview-comment changes: coastal boundaries, copy updates, removing the Scene layers panel, improving responsive layout, and syncing the React export.
Applying preview-comment changes: coastal boundaries, copy updates, removing the Scene layers panel, improving responsive layout, and syncing the React export.
Adding embed mode for the React iframe and restoring the export sync header.
Adding embed mode for the React iframe and restoring the export sync header.
Applied all preview comments to `lightgbm-emissions-art-v2.html` and synced `vite-app/public/illustrations/lightgbm-emissions-art.html`.

### Visual — US coastlines
- Exterior boundaries from TopoJSON (`mesh` where only one county shares the arc)
- **Thicker, lighter** strokes: warm off-white (`#E8E6DF`) plus a soft glow layer so coasts read clearly against the dark map

### Copy & UI
| Mark | Change |
|------|--------|
| **H1** | “MOVESAI over real US counties” |
| **Lead** | Plain-language description (no GeoJSON jargon) |
| **Explain panel** | Ensemble core rename + full output granularity; predictors = **vehicles + VMT only**; shorter arc-dots line |
| **Phase label** | Always **YEAR** (no inference-sweep text) |
| **Scene layers panel** | **Removed** — bottom bar is year scrubber + vehicle toggles only |

### Responsive (desktop / tablet / mobile)
- **≤1024px**: tighter padding, 2-column bottom controls
- **≤640px**: stacked controls, smaller title, full-width county callout, safe-area padding
- **`?embed=1`**: hides header + legend for React iframe (sidebar route)

### React export
- `illustrations.js` title/description updated to match
- Vite `public/illustrations/lightgbm-emissions-art.html` re-synced

Refresh the preview — you should see lighter coast outlines, updated copy, and a simpler control strip. On phone/tablet, controls stack without clipping the map.Applied all preview comments to `lightgbm-emissions-art-v2.html` and synced `vite-app/public/illustrations/lightgbm-emissions-art.html`.

Refresh the preview — you should see lighter coast outlines, updated copy, and a simpler control strip. On phone/tablet, controls stack without clipping the map.
